content.headline: Your Personalized Demo is Ready
content.body:
Hi [Name],

Based on our conversation and your interest in improving team performance, I've prepared a personalized demo focused on your specific challenges.

We'll cover:
• [CLM_003] - How QWL-guided, evidence-based actions help teams focus effort where impact is highest
• [CLM_032] - How action ranking considers expected ROI and feasibility to avoid initiative overload

This demo is customized for your use case and takes just 30 minutes.
